title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
summary: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

title: Warner Bros. Set to Price $15 Billion Loan Deal Amid High Demand
summary: Final terms have been set on $15 billion of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. loans, as the media company refinances debt ahead of its pending acquisition by Paramount Skydance Corp.

title: Defense Firm CSG’s Founder Seeks Money to Expand New Group
summary: The founder of CSG NV, which completed the biggest ever initial public offering for a pure defense company four months ago, is seeking to raise as much as €200 million ($233 million) this year to expand his industrial group.

title: Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense to Advance Digital Asset Strategy
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense to Advance Digital Asset Strategy
Mastercard has secured a BitLicense from the New York State Department of Financial Services.
This post Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense to Advance Digital Asset Strategy first appeared on Bitcoin Magazi

title: Kraken Launches Bitcoin Vault, Offering Yield on BTC Holdings
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Launches Bitcoin Vault, Offering Yield on BTC Holdings
Kraken has launched Bitcoin Vault within its Earn suite, enabling long-term holders to generate BTC-denominated rewards on their Bitcoin without selling.
This post Kraken Launches Bitcoin Vault, Offering Yield on BTC Hol

title: Kraken Now Lets You Earn Yield on Bitcoin Holdings via Lending Vaults
summary: Kraken customers can make use of their Bitcoin holdings and generate BTC yield without ever leaving the exchange.

title: Huawei's New Benchmark Gives AI Agents Months of Your Life—Then Watches Them Fail
summary: Claw-Anything simulates a real digital existence and asks AI assistants to handle it. GPT-5.5, the best model available, scored 34.5%.

title: Kraken expands Earn suite with Bitcoin Vault paying yield on BTC holdings
summary: Bitcoin Vault routes deposits into DeFi lending protocols, including Aave and Morpho, to generate BTC rewards.

title: Aztec Labs acquires ZKPassport, pledges to keep privacy protocol and iOS mobile app open-source
summary: The Obsidion team, including co-founders Michael Elliot and Theo Madzou, will join Aztec Labs to continue developing ZKPassport.

title: Oil falls as Iranian state television reports details of peace proposal
summary: Broadcast said draft deal would restore Strait of Hormuz shipping within a month

title: Iran’s ultra-hardliners lash out at deal negotiators
summary: Influential conservative lawmakers insist Tehran stick to maximalist terms for ending conflict with Washington
